title: CPH2583_16.0.5.702(EX01) is available
description:
New version: CPH2583_16.0.5.702(EX01)Smart lifestyle from every detail

• You can now start multiple timers simultaneously for more efficient multitasking.

• Timers now display estimated stop times, making them easier to use.

• Content Portal now supports app clones for easier content sharing.

• Adds the Motion cues feature, which reduces motion sickness when you use your phone in vehicles. You can find this feature in "Settings - Accessibility & convenience - Motion cues".

• Adds the "Automatically open received files" switch, which lets you choose whether to automatically open shared files upon receipt.

Security & privacy

• Integrates the March 2026 Android security patch to enhance system security.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is installing. During installation you cannot use your device at all, even to dial 9-1-1
